acceptance_targets: [chapter_05_F001] Pass if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:462, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:476, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:482 contains no more than one abstract diagnosis of the system's punitive logic, and the ending at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:546 still makes the coercion legible through the ride-credit chime/bench arrangement alone. Fail if narration and dialogue both restate the same idea in sequence.

[chapter_05_F002] Pass if, after revision, no more than two of the cited moments still hinge on an 'It was not/That was not ... It was ...' construction and each cited beat reads with materially different syntax on the page. Fail if three or more of those pivots still use the same negation/redefinition formula.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:462, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:476, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:482 contains no more than one abstract diagnosis of the system's punitive logic, and the ending at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:546 still makes the coercion legible through the ride-credit chime/bench arrangement alone. Fail if narration and dialogue both restate the same idea in sequence.
findings.problem: The closing kitchen-table scene explains the chapter's central realization after the prior scenes have already dramatized it. The narration at line 462 diagnoses the system's logic in full, then the dialogue at lines 476 and 482 paraphrases the same insight again. That repetition softens the humiliation instead of sharpening it, so the chapter finishes closer to thesis statement than ordeal.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:462, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:476, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:482 so the kitchen-table realization is stated once, not three times. Keep the numbers and immediate household costs legible in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:472 and let the bodily/logistical ending in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:546 carry the coercive conclusion without a second explanatory paraphrase. Strategy options: cut Ben's summary line, compress Nita's abstract paragraph into one sharper sentence, or move the weight onto the restored-credit alert and bench image.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after revision, no more than two of the cited moments still hinge on an 'It was not/That was not ... It was ...' construction and each cited beat reads with materially different syntax on the page. Fail if three or more of those pivots still use the same negation/redefinition formula.
findings.problem: A repeated negation-then-redefinition sentence shape becomes a visible tic: 'It was not X. It was Y.' or close variants recur across at least seven emotional pivots. The first use feels chosen; by the later uses, the syntax starts doing the emphasis for the prose, flattening moments that should land through different rhythms and images.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise several of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:246, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:266, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:286, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:324, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:354, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_05.md:488 so no more than two beats retain the same negation/redefinition template. Replace the others with direct image, action, or focalizer-specific syntax so the sublet, Pilar curb scene, Leela hallway exchange, and late silence each have distinct sentence pressure.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the ugly overlap between office systems and intimate life: sweat under formalwear, sponsored groceries in the middle of a fight, sex that clarifies nothing, a child noticing coercion through object logic. When choosing between elegant abstraction and embarrassing specificity, choose specificity unless the character is actively lying to themselves. If a scene risks becoming pure farce, restore weight through money, care work, or the body's limits; if it risks becoming solemn prestige fiction, let the absurd machinery stay absurd.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a draft replaces bodily fact, financial shame, sexual consequence, or emotional cruelty with tasteful summary, rewrite until the cost is present in scene rather than merely reported.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, ritual formality, or character-specific self-control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: No two consecutive chapters should move the same way. Follow spectacle with aftermath, ritual with drift, humiliation with quiet, revelation with preparation. Vary scene count, dialogue density, location spread, and whether the chapter advances by confrontation, seduction, dread, comic escalation, or changed understanding.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary English with room for corporate and systems language when characters would actually think or speak that way; every abstract term should be contaminated by bodily or household reality nearby.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third that stays inside the current focalizer's sensory field and only shifts focalization at scene breaks.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate dry compression for comic pressure with longer, accrual-based sentences when shame, fatigue, or desire flood the body. Let jokes land through timing and juxtaposition rather than narrator commentary.
